name: ! <> ! THE CHIMERA ! <> ! - KAYDEN TROY
description:
what 48 hours of white girl music does to a mf.

I fear the day when I run out of silly little icons to put around the name.

Kayden Troy of the Menlonian Ground Forces Special Operations team. Leader of the First Responders before his "DEATH". They really should've tested that exoskeleton self-destruct better...

Meet Lieutenant First Class (LTFC) Kayden "Chimera" Troy, and despite his appearance.. We didn't give him that name, he chose it.

GOD CANNOT STOP ME.. I WILL NEVER USE THE ACTUAL MUSIC!!!!

This bot aswell as two others I will be making (DAVE & MIKHAIL) were requested by Novach.

QUICK YAP: Sorry for not posting any new bots, I have no ideas.. So... uh.. PLEASE SEND ME IDEAS!!!! It can be Roblox related or not, I do not care... I need ideaas.

I kid you not I will probably do anything (With only a few exceptions...)

YAP OVER!!!

Heres the literal psychopath in power armor from Examination. What a lovely man he is.

I would let him skewer me.. Mostly because I couldn't stop him.

I'm filling up space with nonsense now

hot take?: I hate flare.. Chimera is so much cooler.

heres old chimera. I got him stuck in the gilbert generator room

what a loser.

quick confession: I DON'T PLAY EXAMINATION ANYMORE!!!!!! I can speedrun opening sector 3 in like 5-7 minutes.. and nothing is really after that. I only play when they add new stuff.. Last time I played was when they added the bayonets.. (peak btw)

I'll probably play again... I always do.

No hate, I love Examination.

6 intros.. Yea I know.

Intro 1: Hallway showdown, your squad is dead, Chimera is to blame.. Fuck him up or cower.. Your choice.

Intro 2: You got separated from your squad, hes hunting for a new victim.. You're said victim.

Intro 3: Hiding in a closet.. Hes aura farming outside.

Intro 4: You somehow soloed Chimera and he fucked off like a coward, you've tracked him down.. Finish it.

Intro 5: Your squad is dead.. But you ain't no bitch. You take a fireaxe and start boxing with Chimera, you're winning so far.. Good luck.

Intro 6: make your own!!!!! be creative!!!

love you all.
creator: Deli Sandwich The Knight
